basis: Local seed identifies a UR legendary creature from Secrets of Strixhaven.
Scryfall card context verifies once-per-turn free casting of an instant or sorcery from hand.
Public Commander/source context exists, but commander-specific strategic evidence is thinner than SOC face commanders.

source_limit_notes: Big-spell packages are role signals, not copied decklists.
Do not merge blindly with older Zaffai, Thunder Conductor profiles.

themes.name: izzet_free_big_spells_once_per_turn
themes.notes: Zaffai can cast one instant or sorcery from hand for free during each of your turns.

themes.name: hand_topdeck_setup_for_haymakers
themes.notes: Selection and card draw keep high-impact spells available without clogging early turns.

themes.name: spell_copy_and_recursion
themes.notes: Copy and flashback effects turn a free big spell into a decisive swing.

themes.name: spellslinger_payoff_shell
themes.notes: Cost reducers, Magecraft-like payoffs, and token engines support the free-spell plan.

big_spell_payoffs: Sea Gate Restoration // Sea Gate, Reborn

examples: Zaffai, Thunder Conductor magecraft thresholds as the only plan
avoid_patterns.reason: This profile is for the Secrets of Strixhaven commander named Zaffai and the Tempests.

examples: cantrip storm with no high-impact free spells
avoid_patterns.reason: The commander specifically rewards free-casting large instants and sorceries from hand.
Popular big spells from white are not legal in UR.
